sourcesContent:
const products = [
  {
    id: '1',
    name: 'Smartphone Pro Max',
    category: 'Electronics',

    description: 'Powerful smartphone with premium camera, long battery life, and immersive display.',
  },
  {

    name: 'Wireless Headphones',
    category: 'Audio',
    price: 129,

    category: 'Sportswear',
    price: 79,
    rating: 4.3,

    description: 'Soft cotton men’s t-shirt with a regular fit and breathable comfort.',
  },
  {

  {

  {

    description: 'Versatile casual jacket with lightweight insulation and modern styling.',

export default products;
